db_queries_executed: SELECT id, market_slug, side, pnl_usd, entry_px, exit_px, reason_close FROM trades ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 25
SELECT pnl_usd FROM trades WHERE status='closed' AND pnl_usd IS NOT NULL ORDER BY COALESCE(ts_close, ts_open) DESC, id DESC LIMIT 25

display_area_verdicts.area: 1) Open positions panel: DB open rows vs /api/trades vs dashboard display
display_area_verdicts.evidence: DB open rows=0; /api/trades?limit=60 open rows=0; UI shows Open: 0 and no open position cards.

display_area_verdicts.area: 2) Bankroll/accounting strip: available_cash, committed, live equity
display_area_verdicts.evidence: /api/state bankroll available_cash=905.89, capital_committed=0.00, open_trade_count=0; UI shows Available Cash $905.89, Committed $0.00, Live Equity +$0.00. Internal consistency holds for zero-open state.

Top-level net/realized are correct (/api/state pnl.realized=405.8899, api/bankroll net_pnl=405.89, UI Net P&L +$405.89). But Positions tab tile labeled 'Realized P&L' shows +$43.62 (sum of only recently displayed closed trades), not total realized.
display_area_verdicts.root_cause: dashboard.html renderPositionsTab computes todayRealized from sliced/visible closed set instead of authoritative realized value from /api/state or /api/bankroll.

recommended_fix_scope.notes: Replace closed-slice reduction with authoritative realized/net source and relabel if intentionally showing recent-only metric.

display_area_verdicts.area: 4) r25 win rate: shown vs DB-computed r25
display_area_verdicts.evidence: UI shows 52%; /api/state r25.win_rate=0.52; DB recompute from last 25 closed non-null pnl rows gives 13/25=0.52.

display_area_verdicts.area: 5) Position card fields: entry_px/current_px/TP-SL/PnL sign BUY_YES+BUY_NO
display_area_verdicts.evidence: No open positions at audit time (DB and API both zero), so no live cards available to validate current_px behavior and sign semantics on BUY_NO in runtime rendering.
display_area_verdicts.root_cause: Runtime state had zero open positions; verification requires at least one open BUY_YES and one open BUY_NO card.

recommended_fix_scope.notes: Follow-up verification run during active positions.

display_area_verdicts.area: 6) Game feed: games shown, status labels accurate
display_area_verdicts.evidence: /api/games includes one in-progress game (PIT@CHC Top 7th) and scheduled games; UI shows PIT 2-0 CHC as live and remaining entries as scheduled markers (S), aligned with API status semantics.

display_area_verdicts.area: 7) Mark source: stale mark fallback (mark_source) displaying correctly
display_area_verdicts.evidence: Backend emits mark_source in positions stream payload, but live position cards do not render mark_source text anywhere. UI source chip shows trade source (bot/model/manual), not mark source (stream/rest_fallback/poll_fallback).
display_area_verdicts.root_cause: dashboard.html stores mark_source on position objects but buildUnifiedPositionCards does not display it.

recommended_fix_scope.notes: Expose mark_source in card metadata and stale indicators so REST fallback visibility is explicit.

additional_findings.finding: R25 tile sublabel shows '0 trades' because UI reads s.total_closed, which is absent in /api/state payload.
additional_findings.evidence: dashboard.html line ~683 uses (s.total_closed ?? 0); /api/state includes total_trades and r25.sample_size, not total_closed.

recommended_fix_scope.notes: Use s.total_trades or s.r25.sample_size depending intended label.

approval_recommendation.reason: Two concrete dashboard truth defects remain (Positions-tab realized P&L mis-sourced; mark_source not displayed), plus position-card sign semantics could not be runtime-verified due to zero open positions.
